home.welcomeFirst: Hello, it's great to have you here. Today we'll review how your health is doing, calmly and without rush.
home.welcomeReturning: Hello again. Your last visit was {{days}} days ago. Would you like to record new data?
home.welcomeReturningToday: Hello again. Your last visit was today. Would you like to record new data?
home.privacyNotice: Your data is stored only on this device. Nothing is sent to the internet.

hasDraft.title: You have a measurement in progress
hasDraft.subtitle: You can continue where you left off or start fresh.

basicForm.title: First, tell me a little about yourself
basicForm.subtitle: These details help me understand your body and personalize your results.

summary.title: Before we continue, let's review some details.
summary.body: I've marked them in red for you. When they're correct, they'll turn green.

firstName.label: Your first name
firstName.help: Just your given name, no surnames.

birthDate.label: When did you arrive in the world? Your birth date
birthDate.help: We use this to calculate your age, no need to type it.

age.label: Age
age.help: We calculate it from your birth date, so you don't have to worry.

wristContexture.label: Your wrist frame
wristContexture.help: Measure your wrist just above the bone. This helps us calculate your ideal weight more precisely.

errors.required: Oops, it looks like this detail slipped by. Would you share it with me?
errors.tooShort: It's a bit too short. Could you write it in full?
errors.tooLong: It's too long. Could you shorten it a little?
errors.invalidChars: Only letters, spaces and hyphens, please.
errors.needsLetters: It needs to contain at least one letter.
errors.invalidNumber: Hmm, that number doesn't add up. Could you double-check it?
errors.invalidDate: Hmm, that date doesn't add up. Could you double-check it?
errors.ageOutOfRange: To use this app you need to be between 10 and 120 years old. Is the date correct?
errors.heightOutOfRange: That height is outside what I expected (100–230 cm). Could we double-check it?
errors.futureDate: The birth date cannot be in the future.

metricsForm.title: Now, today's measurements
metricsForm.subtitle: If you don't have an exact value for any of them, don't worry. Leave it empty and we'll go on with the ones you do have.

summary.title: Before we continue, let's review some measurements.
summary.body: I've marked them in red for you. When they're correct, they'll turn green.

weight.label: Your current weight
weight.help: In kilograms, as accurate as possible.

bmi.label: Your BMI
bmi.help: If you don't have it calculated, we figure it out when showing the results. Leave empty if you don't know it.

bodyFatPct.label: Body fat percentage
bodyFatPct.help: Usually measured by smart scales or calipers. Leave empty if you don't have it.

muscleMassPct.label: Muscle mass percentage
muscleMassPct.help: Same as body fat, from your scale or exam. Leave empty if you don't have it.

calories.label: Calories you consume per day
calories.help: An estimate is fine, it doesn't need to be exact.

bioAge.label: Your biological age
bioAge.help: What your body indicates, not your ID. Leave empty if you don't know it.

visceralFat.label: Visceral fat level
visceralFat.help: From your scale or bioimpedance. Integer number.

errors.required: Oops, it looks like this detail slipped by. Would you share it with me?
errors.invalidNumber: Hmm, that number doesn't add up. Could you double-check it?
errors.outOfRange: That value is outside what I expected ({{min}}–{{max}}). Is it correct?
errors.weightOutOfRange: Weight is usually between 20 and 300 kg. Is it correct?
errors.bmiOutOfRange: BMI is usually between 10 and 60. Is it correct?
errors.bodyFatOutOfRange: Body fat % is usually between 3 and 50%. Is it correct?
errors.muscleOutOfRange: Muscle % is usually between 10 and 70%. Is it correct?
errors.caloriesOutOfRange: Daily calories are usually between 800 and 6000. Is it correct?
errors.bioAgeOutOfRange: Biological age is usually between 10 and 100 years. Is it correct?
errors.visceralOutOfRange: Visceral fat goes from 1 to 30. Is it correct?
